skills.name: git-safe-operator
skills.description: Inspect git status, diffs, branches, and prepare commits safely while preserving unrelated user changes.

skills.name: javascript-typescript-developer
skills.description: Build, debug, refactor, and type-check JavaScript and TypeScript code using project conventions and minimal dependencies.

skills.name: Mcub-commander
skills.description: Execute, explain, list, and choose MCUB userbot commands while passing mcub.command arguments without prefixes.

skills.name: MCUB-debugger-fixer
skills.description: Run, interpret, and fix MCUB debugger warnings and errors while preserving module behavior and build history.

skills.name: MCUB-docs-navigator
skills.description: Navigate and explain local MCUB documentation while routing module and API questions to the right sources and warning against Hikka assumptions.

skills.name: MCUB-module-auditor
skills.description: Statically audit MCUB modules before release for safety, metadata, dependencies, commands, inline callbacks, and release readiness without editing code.

skills.name: MCUB-modules-creator
skills.description: Create and update debug MCUB userbot modules in app-debug using the MCUB module API, class-style modules, and inline form/callback docs.

skills.name: MCUB-openagent-workflow
skills.description: Route OpenAgent MCUB work across repo navigation, debugger fixes, module creation, release workflows, and skill registry management.

skills.name: MCUB-release-modules
skills.description: Validate, publish, index, commit, and push MCUB modules from debug builds into the MCUB module repository.

skills.name: MCUB-runtime-config-manager
skills.description: Safely inspect and manage MCUB runtime configuration, prefixes, aliases, trusted users, access rules, and backups with secret masking and confirmations.

skills.name: prompt_ui_styler
skills.description: Adjust OpenAgent appearance, answer layout, thinking/status text, emojis, labels, templates, and config UI safely.

skills.name: python-developer
skills.description: Write, review, debug, and refactor Python code with project-aware style, tests, async safety, and clean error handling.

skills.name: repository-navigator
skills.description: Quickly map unfamiliar repositories, locate files, identify stack conventions, and point code tasks to the right implementation area.

skills.name: test-and-lint-runner
skills.description: Choose and run focused tests, lint, type checks, syntax checks, and builds safely in non-interactive project environments.
